title: abeec Slime Putty For Kids, 600g Putty for Children & Adults In 4 Colours, Great Fidget Toys and For Stress Relief, Perfect Party Bag Fillers For Kids
features: Stress Balls & Sensory Toys: Not Just For Kids. Our Bouncing Putty Is Also Great For Adults As A Stress Relief Tool. Squishing And Stretching The Putty Provides A Satisfying Sensory Experience, Perfect For Unwinding After A Long Day

Unleash Creativity: This Bouncing Putty Is Perfect For Imaginative Play. Kids Can Mould, Shape, And Bounce Their Creations, Providing Hours Of Entertainment. Whether Crafting A Bouncy Ball Or A Fantastic Figure, The Possibilities Are Limitless

Safe & Non-toxic: Safety Is Our Top Priority. Our Bouncing Putty Is Non-toxic And Safe For Children Ages 6 And Up. Parents Can Rest Easy Knowing Their Little Ones Are Playing With A High-quality, Safe Product That Encourages Imaginative Play

Perfect Gift Idea: Looking For The Perfect Gift For A Birthday Or Special Occasion? Our Bouncing Slime Putty Is A Fantastic Choice For Any Child Aged 6 And Up. It's Fun, Engaging, And Provides Endless Creative Possibilities

X4 Vibrant Colours: Our Bouncing Putty Comes In A 600g Bucket Featuring Four Eye-catching Colours: Pink, Purple, Blue, And Green. Kids Can Mix And Match To Create Dazzling Combinations, Sparking Endless Creativity And Fun
description: Product description Dive into a world of endless fun and creativity with our Bouncing Putty Bonanza. The 600g bucket is packed with vibrant colours - pink, blue, and green - that will captivate and inspire children aged 6 and up. Watch as their imaginations run wild, creating bouncing balls, fantastical figures, and more with this versatile putty. Our bouncing putty is designed to be safe and non-toxic, ensuring peace of mind for parents while their kids explore and play. It's not just for kids, though. Adults can also enjoy the stress-relieving benefits of this sensory-rich putty. Squish, stretch, and bounce your way to relaxation after a busy day. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or just because, this bouncing putty bucket makes an excellent gift for any young creator. Encourage their artistic side and provide them with hours of fun, all while knowing they're playing with a safe and engaging product. Bring home the Bouncing Putty Bonanza today and let the fun begin. Safety Warning Do not ingest, adult supervision recommended.
